meta.title: Live at SpaceX's "StarHopper" (No Ignition, but successful test)
meta.description:
See the super exciting puff of smoke when they ran the pre-burners :P - https://youtu.be/cOm4S8y59Hg?t=15030

SpaceX is hoping to do their first tethered test of their StarShip prototype lovingly called "StarHopper" at their Boca Chica, Texas launch and test site. The duration will literally be like a second, the altitude maybe an inch. Don't expect too much here, but this is still an important step in an exciting future.

Thanks to my Patreon supporters for allowing me the freedom to do ridiculous things like this. If you want to help contribute, head over to http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut
